targets.expr: rate(process_cpu_seconds_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval]) * 100

panels.title: CPU Usage
panels.description: Backend process CPU usage derived from process_cpu_seconds_total.

panels.title: Scheduler dispatch rate
panels.description: Per-second scheduler task dispatch rate by task kind and volatility class.

panels.title: Scheduler in-flight tasks
panels.description: Current number of scheduler tasks running.

panels.title: Essential overloaded
panels.description: Whether the essential polling lane is overloaded. 1 requires attention.

panels.title: Deadline Misses
panels.description: Essential polling deadline misses over the selected rate interval.

panels.title: Backend scrape health
panels.description: Prometheus target health for the selected Theia backend instance. A value of 1 means Prometheus can scrape /metrics.

panels.title: Prometheus scrape duration
panels.description: How long Prometheus spends scraping the selected backend target. Rising scrape duration can point to expensive metrics collection or target pressure.

panels.title: Ready queue depth by class
panels.description: Current ready queue depth by volatility class.

panels.title: Queue lag by class
panels.description: Current overdue scheduler queue lag by volatility class.

panels.title: Scheduler task duration p95
panels.description: 95th percentile scheduler task completion duration by volatility class.

panels.title: Scheduler task duration p99
panels.description: 99th percentile scheduler task completion duration by volatility class.

panels.title: Scheduler backpressure by reason
panels.description: Scheduler throttling events by volatility class and reason.

panels.title: Dispatch heatmap
panels.description: Short-window task dispatch bursts by task kind and volatility class.

panels.title: Poll failures
panels.description: Polling success and failure rate by volatility class.

panels.title: Poll failure ratio
panels.description: Polling failure percentage by volatility class.

panels.title: SNMP operations rate
panels.description: Theia internal SNMP collector operation rate by collector, operation, and result.

panels.title: SNMP early exits
panels.description: SNMP collector early exits by collector and reason.

panels.title: SNMP errors/timeouts
panels.description: True per-second SNMP collector error and timeout rate.

panels.title: SNMP latency p95
panels.description: 95th percentile SNMP collector operation latency.

panels.title: SNMP latency p99
panels.description: 99th percentile SNMP collector operation latency.

panels.title: SNMP operation duration average
panels.description: Average SNMP collector operation duration computed from histogram sum/count.

panels.title: WebSocket connected clients
panels.description: Current connected WebSocket clients.

panels.title: WebSocket messages rate
panels.description: WebSocket message emission rate by scope and message type.

panels.title: WebSocket payload size p95
panels.description: 95th percentile WebSocket payload size by scope and message type.

panels.title: WebSocket backpressure
panels.description: WebSocket backpressure events by hub/client scope and reason. Missing rare-event series are rendered as zero.

panels.title: WebSocket resync required
panels.description: Resync markers emitted when clients need to recover from missed realtime updates. Missing rare-event series are rendered as zero.

panels.title: WebSocket overview mailbox clears
panels.description: Overview mailbox messages cleared per second while stale backlog is replaced with fresher state. Missing rare-event series are rendered as zero.

panels.title: WebSocket overview resync suppressed
panels.description: Overview resync markers suppressed because a resync was already pending. Missing rare-event series are rendered as zero.

panels.title: Snapshot build p95
panels.description: 95th percentile realtime refresh snapshot build duration.

panels.title: Full topology reload rate
panels.description: Rate of full topology reload decisions by reason.

panels.title: Link upserts
panels.description: Topology link upsert rate by discovery protocol and result.

panels.title: Unknown neighbors
panels.description: Unknown neighbor observation rate by discovery protocol.

panels.title: Topology materialization p95
panels.description: 95th percentile static topology materialization duration.

panels.title: Discovery neighbors
panels.description: Current discovered neighbor count by local device and discovery protocol.

panels.title: Static collection timeout skips
panels.description: Rate of static discovery collection operations skipped because timeout-driven cooldown is active, grouped by operation and reason.

panels.title: Static persistence skips
panels.description: Rate of static discovery persistence writes skipped by reason. Unchanged skips mean the result fingerprint matched the last persisted static discovery result.

panels.title: Topology materialization skips
panels.description: Rate of topology materialization passes skipped because the static discovery topology fingerprint was unchanged.

panels.title: CPU vs Scheduler dispatch
panels.description: Overlay CPU with scheduler dispatch to identify polling burst correlation.

panels.title: CPU vs In-flight tasks
panels.description: Overlay CPU with current in-flight scheduler work.

panels.title: CPU vs Queue lag
panels.description: Overlay CPU with max scheduler queue lag.

panels.title: CPU vs Snapshot build
panels.description: Overlay CPU with successful snapshot build p95.

panels.title: CPU vs SNMP latency p95
panels.description: Overlay CPU with SNMP collector p95 latency.

targets.expr:
sum(rate(theia_snmp_collector_operations_total{
  job=~"$job",
  instance=~"$instance",
  collector=~"$collector",
  operation=~"$operation",
  result=~"$result"
}[30s]))

panels.title: CPU vs SNMP operations
panels.description: Overlay CPU with SNMP collector operation volume.

panels.title: CPU vs WebSocket messages
panels.description: Overlay CPU with WebSocket message volume.

panels.title: CPU vs GC
panels.description: Overlay CPU with Go GC CPU fraction.

panels.title: Heap + Goroutines
panels.description: Go heap allocation and goroutine count for runtime pressure checks.

panels.title: SNMP operations per Volume
panels.description: Table of SNMP operation volume by operation and result.

panels.title: Slow SNMP walks
panels.description: Table of high-p95 SNMP operation latency by operation.

panels.title: SNMP Walks Timeout
panels.description: Timeout percentage for scoped SNMP operations.

panels.title: Slow SNMP devices
panels.description: Devices with the highest most-recent SNMP operation duration, grouped by device, target, collector, operation, and result.

panels.title: SNMP device slow events
panels.description: Devices and SNMP operations currently producing slow-operation events. This appears only after operations exceed the backend slow threshold.

panels.title: Bulk operation duration p95
panels.description: 95th percentile bulk operation completion duration.

panels.title: Bulk operation completions
panels.description: Bulk operation completion rate by operation, source, and result.

panels.title: Bulk operations in flight
panels.description: Current active bulk operations by operation and source.

panels.title: Bulk operation rejections
panels.description: Bulk operation rejection rate by operation, reason, and source.

targets.expr:
theia_bulk_operation_in_flight{
  job=~"$job",
  instance=~"$instance",
  operation=~"$bulk_operation"
}
/
on(job, instance, operation, source)
group_left(scope)
theia_bulk_operation_concurrency_limit{
  job=~"$job",
  instance=~"$instance",
  operation=~"$bulk_operation",
  scope="global"
}

panels.title: Bulk operation saturation
panels.description: Current bulk operation concurrency usage divided by the configured global concurrency limit.

panels.title: Prometheus runtime requests
panels.description: Theia backend requests to Prometheus by operation and result.

panels.title: Prometheus runtime errors
panels.description: Theia backend Prometheus request failures.

panels.title: Prometheus runtime latency p95
panels.description: 95th percentile latency for Theia backend Prometheus requests.

panels.title: Cache invalidations
panels.description: Device/link cache invalidation signal rate by source.

panels.title: Cache reloads
panels.description: Full device/link cache reload rate.

panels.title: State changes dropped
panels.description: Dropped state-store change batches. Any value above zero requires investigation.

panels.title: Queue lag
panels.description: Detailed scheduler queue lag by selected volatility class.

panels.title: State changes dropped
panels.description: Dropped state-store change batches. Any value above zero requires investigation.

panels.title: Burst detector
panels.description: Short-window scheduler dispatch count for spotting synchronized polling bursts.
